content: window.open(url, '_blank', 'noopener,noreferrer') opens a new tab/window. Must be called from user event handler (click) or popup blocker fires. Returns WindowProxy or null if blocked. Check return value: if null, show user message asking to allow popups. noopener prevents reverse tabnabbing — CLAUDE.md also lists window.opener as DO NOT USE. The spectator /display route is a regular SPA route opened in a new tab, not a cross-origin popup. BroadcastChannel handles sync without window.opener.
